slides.title: 1 — Source of truth
slides.body:
Intended state in NetBox. What *should* be running — not what is.
Can't agree on "should"? That's the finding.

slides.title: 2 — Render the intent
slides.body:
Python + Jinja pull NetBox and render the config you meant, per device.
No push. No orchestration.

slides.title: 3 — Diff it
slides.body:
Running config vs rendered intent.
Every line that shows up is telling you something.

slides.title: Every diff line is one of three things
The trap: skipping to enforcement
slides.body:
Auto-remediation is month six.
Day one is *visibility* — you can't enforce intent you never wrote down.

slides.title: Write the intent down. The diff writes itself.
slides.body:
Drift is intent living in someone's head instead of a system.

Follow *@mzsnetworks*
